n: Hildegard and the Fate of Woodhurst

steps.t: Hildegard the soothsayer resides in a cave on the cliff overlooking Woodhurst. Gifemund asked you to speak with Hildegard the Soothsayer on his behalf…
Herubrand is in the cellar of the farmhouse. You should tell Herubrand of your meeting with Hildegard on behalf of Gifemund.
Gifemund awaits your return in the ore refinery near the centre of Woodhurst. Herubrand bade you return to Gifemund with Hildegard's words.
